name: Smart Memory
description: Intelligent memory manager with LLM-powered extraction, hybrid ANN vector search, tier lifecycle, spreading activation, procedural rules, WAL capture, Mem0 cloud integration, and session-state hot RAM.

providerAuthChoices.choiceLabel: OpenRouter API Key (required for local extraction/search)
providerAuthChoices.groupHint: API keys for memory extraction and search

providerAuthChoices.choiceLabel: Mem0 API Key (optional, for cloud extraction)

extractionProvider.description: Extraction provider: local (OpenRouter LLM), mem0 (Mem0 cloud), or both.

cheapModel.description: LLM model for extraction and classification.

extractionProvider.label: Extraction Provider
extractionProvider.help: Which service extracts memories from conversations.

cheapModel.label: Extraction Model
cheapModel.help: Cheap/fast model for memory extraction and classification.

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: Model used for vector embeddings in search.

mem0UserId.label: Mem0 User ID
mem0UserId.help: User identifier for Mem0 cloud scoping.

maxRecallChunks.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallChunks.help: Maximum number of memories returned per search.

maxRecallTokens.label: Recall Token Budget
maxRecallTokens.help: Maximum tokens used by recalled memories in the prompt.
